reason: Verified agent can open browser, navigate to URL, retrieve page title, and return response mentioning "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with sidebar containing agent list
Found and clicked the "QA-20260429-003800-7lj5" agent in the sidebar — Agent opened in main area, showing chat interface and configuration sections
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into message input textbox — Message displayed in textbox, Send button became enabled
Clicked Send message button — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", task name "Browser Navigation Title Check" appeared in sidebar
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed in approximately 10 seconds, response received with text "The page title is \"Example Domain\"."

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response text clearly states "The page title is \"Example Domain\"."; tool call cards show "Open Browser https://example.com" and "Browser Command $ get title"; live browser preview panel on right displays the Example Domain page loaded; took full page screenshot showing complete successful execution
